version_description: This version includes lots of little details. I included the ornamental passing chords in the intro/sax lick and verses, plus put the correct chords into the chorus.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab] [ch]D7[/ch]           [ch]Am11[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
|       |            |       |        |   (repeat)[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]            [ch]D7[/ch]                                        [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
The heat is on, on the street.   Inside your head, on every   beat[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
And the beat's alive,    deep inside. The pressure's high,  just to stay alive[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D7[/ch]           [ch]Am11[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
'Cause the heat is on |       |            |       |        |[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C/E[/ch]          [ch]Fadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Oh-oo-woah-oh, Oh-oo-woah-oh, Caught up in the action, I've been looking out for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Oh-oo-woah-oh, Oh-oo-woah-oh, Tell me can you feel it, Tell me can you feel it,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                                   [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]Am11[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
Tell me can you feel it?  The heat is on, the heat is on, the heat is on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]           NC      [ch]D7[/ch]           [ch]Am11[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
Oh it's on the street,    the heat is - - - - on      |            |       |        |[/tab]

[Guitar solo 2x]
[tab] [ch]D7[/ch]           [ch]Am11[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
|       |            |       |        |[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C/E[/ch]          [ch]Fadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Oh-oo-woah-oh, Oh-oo-woah-oh, Caught up in the action, I've been looking out for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Oh-oo-woah-oh, Oh-oo-woah-oh, Tell me can you feel it, Tell me can you feel it,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                                   [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]Am11[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
Tell me can you feel it?  The heat is on, the heat is on, the heat is on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]           NC      [ch]D7[/ch]           [ch]Am11[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
Oh it's on the street,    the heat is - - - - on      |            |       |        |[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]            [ch]D7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
The shadows high on the darker side.     Behind those doors, it's a wilder ride[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D7[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
You can make a break, you can win or lose. That's a chance you take, when the heat's on you[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D7[/ch]           [ch]Am11[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]
When the heat is on |       |            |       |        |[/tab]

[Final Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C/E[/ch]          [ch]Fadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Oh-oo-woah-oh, Oh-oo-woah-oh, Caught up in the action, I've been looking out for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Oh-oo-woah-oh, Oh-oo-woah-oh, Tell me can you feel it, Tell me can you feel it,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                                   [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]Am11[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
Tell me can you feel it?  The heat is on, the heat is on, the heat is on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]Am11[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
Oh it's on the street,    the heat is on, the heat is on, the heat is on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]Am11[/ch]    [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
Oh it's on the street,    the heat is on, the heat is on, the heat is on[/tab]
